description: Phase 3: automate analysis publishing and build the growth funnel while protecting quality.

userStories.title: Define publishing cadence and coverage targets
userStories.description: As the founder, I need a clear cadence and coverage plan so automation knows what to publish.
acceptanceCriteria: Cadence defined per league and matchday

userStories.title: Build scheduler for batch runs
userStories.description: As the system, I need scheduled batch runs so analyses are produced without manual steps.
acceptanceCriteria: Scheduler triggers batch runs by round/date

userStories.title: Telegram publishing pipeline
userStories.description: As the system, I need a reliable publisher so reports land in Telegram on time.

userStories.title: Free vs paid access gating
userStories.description: As the founder, I need tiered access so free users see value but power users pay.

userStories.title: Quality guardrails in publishing
userStories.description: As the system, I must block publishing when quality regresses.
acceptanceCriteria: Publish blocked if narrative score below threshold
Publish blocked if data coverage below threshold

userStories.title: Content templating for distribution
userStories.description: As the founder, I need consistent templates for Telegram that preserve tone and clarity.
acceptanceCriteria: Templates defined for match clarity and market clarity

userStories.title: Monitoring dashboard for pipeline health
userStories.description: As the founder, I need visibility into automation reliability.
acceptanceCriteria: Dashboard shows last run status and failures

userStories.title: Engagement tracking
userStories.description: As the founder, I need engagement metrics to measure growth.
